title: Crispy Duck Breast with Croatian Stir-Fry
description: A delicious and flavorful dish featuring crispy duck breast paired with a rich and spicy Croatian-style stir-fry.
instructions: Season the duck breast with salt and black pepper.
Heat 1 tablespoon of oil in an oven-safe pan over medium heat. Sear the duck breast for 2-3 minutes on each side.
Transfer the pan to the preheated oven and cook for 12-15 minutes or until the duck reaches 63°C (145°F) for medium-rare.
While the duck is cooking, heat the remaining 1 tablespoon of oil in a separate pan over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced onion and bell pepper to the pan and cook for 3-4 minutes or until they start to soften.
Add the minced garlic and Croatian paprika to the pan and cook for another minute.
Stir-fry the mixture for a further 2-3 minutes or until the vegetables are tender.
Remove the duck from the oven and let it rest for 5 minutes before slicing.
Serve the crispy duck breast with the Croatian-style stir-fry.
